E3: Tweak of paymodels 200-1646-001 (Fort Knox Cats) and 200-1196-001 (Wolf Run)
A4: * Hold percentages and Hit Frequencies represent long term statistical probabilities.
B109: 40 lines fixed bet for 40 coins times the bet multiplier. Highest win pays left to right on paylines.
B110: WildWolf Symbol is wild and substitutes for all symbols except the Bonus symbol.
B111: Three Bonus symbols on middle reels pay 2x total bet and initiate Bonus with 5 bonus spins.
B124: In the Bonus three Bonus symbols on middle reels pay 2x total bet and retrigger 5 additional bonus spins
B125: up to a maximum of 255 bonus spins per bonus round.
B444: The Fort Knox Bonus may be randomly triggered on any base game spin that does not trigger the Bonus. A random draw is made from the Trigger table to determine if the Fort Knox Bonus is triggered.
B446: When the Fort Knox Bonus is triggered, a random draw is made from the Award table using the corresponding bet multiplier from the spin that triggered the Fort Knox Bonus,
B447: to determine if the progressive or a fixed award with or without boost is awarded.
B448: The listed average pay values have already been multiplied by the bet multiplier. The Copper, Silver, Gold, and Platinum No Boost awards scale directly with the bet multiplier.
B449: The value listed for the Progressive award does not include the increment.
B450: If an award with Boost A or Boost B is chosen, then a random draw is also made from the Scenario table corresponding to the award chosen.
B451: Once the scenario is chosen and if a Boost award is determined, then the Boost values are determined from the corresponding Boost tables. Boost values are multiplied by the bet multiplier.
B452: If an award with Boost A is chosen, a boost value is selected from the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost A table and is added to the No Boost award value.
B453: For example, if at bet multiplier 1, Platinum Boost A is chosen, scenario 1 is chosen, and 5000 is chosen from the Boost A table, the total award is 25,000 + 5000 = 30,000.
B454: If an award with Boost B is chosen, a boost value is selected from both the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost A and the evenly weighted (1 - 6) Boost B tables and is added to the No Boost award value.
B455: For example, if at bet multiplier 2, Gold Boost B and scenario 2 are chosen, then a draw is made from the Scenario 2 Boost A and Scenario 2 Boost B tables and 1,250 and 750 are determined, respectively.
B457: The Fort Knox Bonus ends after the prize is awarded.
B673: * Volatility index represents how far from average actual payback can be 95% of the time after 10,000 games played.
B674: The larger the index, the more volatile the game.
B678: Top Single Award is the Progressive award in the Fort Knox Bonus.
B679: Top Single Award Odds are 1 in 7,500,000 at min bet. Odds scale linearly with the bet.
